findings.concern: Payment handling and PCI-DSS obligations are absent from the brief
findings.evidence: brief describes a checkout UI but never names a payment provider or a card-data boundary

findings.concern: Personal-data retention and deletion policy is undefined
findings.evidence: signup collects personal fields; no retention or deletion language found in the brief
findings.prerequisite_note: DPA review must complete before go-live

findings.concern: Rollback and incident path for a failed go-live is only hinted at
findings.evidence: brief says 'we can revert if needed' with no mechanism or owner

findings.concern: Support-staff workflows after launch are not described
findings.evidence: no mention of the support team anywhere in the brief

findings.concern: Localization scope is ambiguous: two markets named, one language
findings.evidence: brief names the DE and FR markets but only English content
